metadata.title: I Bind Unto Myself Today
metadata.subtitle: St. Patrick's Breastplate — Irish, tr. Cecil Frances Alexander (1889)
metadata.composer: Irish traditional melody "St. Patrick" (adapted by Charles Villiers Stanford, 1902)
metadata.lyricist: St. Patrick (c. 387–461, Old Irish original "Lorica of Saint Patrick"); English translation by Cecil Frances Alexander (1818–1895)
metadata.x_pd_basis: St. Patrick's 5th-century Old Irish original is fully PD. Alexander's 1889 English translation is PD (d. 1895). Stanford's 1902 arrangement is also PD (d. 1924, > 100 years)
